svg.title: Interactive Tilt Function: x · exprel(γ x)
svg.desc: Drag the slider, scroll over the plot to adjust γ, or double-click the plot to reset γ = 0. Toggle "Standardize" to apply the tilt_standardizers(γ) transform so the output has mean 0 and variance 1 for x ~ N(0,1). Axes are fixed to [-2, 2] on both x and y.
svg.text: exprel(t) = (exp(t) - 1)/t (stable eval); toggle standardization via tilt_standardizers(γ).
